revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:March 28 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of March 28 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦3月28日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]_月_日） - [[最澄]]と[[空海]]が[[遣唐使]]として入唐 * （[[1356年]]_月_日） - 北朝が延文に改元 * [[慶長]]16年（[[1611年]]_月_日） - [[徳川家康]]が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]]を[[二条城]]に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[神仏判然令]]公布。[[神仏混淆]]を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[明治]]2年（[[1869年]]_月_日） - [[明治天皇]]が京都から江戸城に入城。事実上の東京遷都
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[天和]]2年（[[1682年]]_月_日） - [[西山宗因]]、[[連歌師]]（* [[1605年]]） * [[明治]]4年（[[1871年]][[5月17日]]） - [[毛利敬親]]、[[長州藩]]主（* [[1819年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月27日 (旧暦)|3月27日]] 翌日[[3月29日 (旧暦)|3月29日]] - 前月[[2月28日 (旧暦)|2月28日]] 翌月[[4月28日 (旧暦)|4月28日]] *新暦[[3月28日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 忌日 == * [[天和 (元号)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[5月5日]]） - [[西山宗因]]、[[連歌師]]（* [[1605年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[5月17日]]） - [[毛利敬親]]、[[長州藩]]主（* [[1819年]]）

== できごと == * [[延暦]]23年（[[ユリウス暦]][[804年]][[5月11日]]） - [[最澄]]と[[空海]]が[[遣唐使]]として入唐 * [[延文]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1356年]][[4月29日]]） - 北朝が[[文和]]より延文に[[改元]] * [[慶長]]16年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1611年]][[5月10日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]]を[[二条城]]に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月20日]]） - [[神仏判然令]]公布。[[神仏混淆]]を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[5月9日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== 誕生日 == * [[延宝]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1676年]][[5月10日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（+ [[1726年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[5月5日]]） - [[西山宗因]]、[[連歌師]]（* [[1605年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[5月17日]]） - [[毛利敬親]]、[[長州藩]]主（* [[1819年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

== 忌日 == * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[5月5日]]） - [[西山宗因]]、[[連歌師]]（* [[1605年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[5月17日]]） - [[毛利敬親]]、[[長州藩]]主（* [[1819年]]）

{{Lunar March}} '''March 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 28'''<!--Lunar March28 is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[延暦]]23年（[[ユリウス暦]][[804年]][[5月11日]]） - [[最澄]]と[[空海]]が[[遣唐使]]として入唐 * [[延文]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1356年]][[4月29日]]） - 北朝が[[文和]]より延文に[[改元]] * [[慶長]]16年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1611年]][[5月10日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]]を[[二条城]]に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月20日]]） - [[神仏判然令]]公布。[[神仏混淆]]を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[5月9日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * [[延宝]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1676年]][[5月10日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（+ [[1726年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[5月5日]]） - [[西山宗因]]、[[連歌師]]（* [[1605年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[5月17日]]） - [[毛利敬親]]、[[長州藩]]主（* [[1819年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 28'''<!--Lunar March28 is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[延暦]]23年（[[ユリウス暦]][[804年]][[5月11日]]） - [[最澄]]と[[空海]]が[[遣唐使]]として入唐 * [[延文]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1356年]][[4月29日]]） - 北朝が[[文和]]より延文に[[改元]] * [[慶長]]16年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1611年]][[5月10日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]]を[[二条城]]に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月20日]]） - [[神仏判然令]]公布。[[神仏混淆]]を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[5月9日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * [[延宝]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1676年]][[5月10日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（+ [[1726年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[5月5日]]） - [[西山宗因]]、[[連歌師]]（* [[1605年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[5月17日]]） - [[毛利敬親]]、[[長州藩]]主（* [[1819年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

--> == Events == * [[延暦]]23年（[[ユリウス暦]][[804年]][[5月11日]]） - [[最澄]]と[[空海]]が[[遣唐使]]として入唐 * [[延文]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1356年]][[4月29日]]） - 北朝が[[文和]]より延文に[[改元]] * [[慶長]]16年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1611年]][[5月10日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]]を[[二条城]]に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月20日]]） - [[神仏判然令]]公布。[[神仏混淆]]を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[5月9日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]

[[sn:March 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] [[zh:三月廿八]] [[en:draft:March 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[延暦]]23年（[[Julian Calendar]][[804]][[5月11日]]） - [[最澄]]と[[空海]]が[[遣唐使]]として入唐 * [[延文]]1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1356]][[4月29日]]） - 北朝が[[文和]]より延文に[[改元]] * [[慶長]]16年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1611]][[5月10日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]]を[[二条城]]に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[4月20日]]） - [[神仏判然令]]公布。[[神仏混淆]]を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[5月9日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * [[延宝]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1676]][[5月10日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（+ [[1726]]）
== Deaths == * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682]][[5月5日]]） - [[西山宗因]]、[[連歌師]]（* [[1605]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871]][[5月17日]]） - [[毛利敬親]]、[[長州藩]]主（* [[1819]]）

[[sn:March 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] [[zh:三月廿八]] [[en:draft:March 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[延暦]]23年（[[Julian Calendar]][[804]][[5月11日]]） - [[最澄]]と[[空海]]が[[遣唐使]]として入唐 * [[延文]]1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]11th year（ユリウス暦[[1356]][[4月29日]]） - 北朝が[[文和]]より延文に[[改元]] * [[慶長]]16年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1611]][[5月10日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]]を[[二条城]]に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[4月20日]]） - [[神仏判然令]]公布。[[神仏混淆]]を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[明治]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[5月9日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * [[延宝]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1676]][[5月10日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（+ [[1726]]）
== Deaths == * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1682]][[5月5日]]） - [[西山宗因]]、[[連歌師]]（* [[1605]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871]][[5月17日]]） - [[毛利敬親]]、[[長州藩]]主（* [[1819]]）

[[sn:March 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] [[zh:三月廿八]] [[en:draft:March 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[延暦]]23rd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[804]][[5月11日]]） - [[最澄]]と[[空海]]が[[遣唐使]]として入唐 * [[延文]]1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]11th year（ユリウス暦[[1356]][[4月29日]]） - 北朝が[[文和]]より延文に[[改元]] * [[慶長]]16th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1611]][[5月10日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]]を[[二条城]]に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[4月20日]]） - [[神仏判然令]]公布。[[神仏混淆]]を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[明治]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[5月9日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * [[延宝]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1676]][[5月10日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（+ [[1726]]）
== Deaths == * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1682]][[5月5日]]） - [[西山宗因]]、[[連歌師]]（* [[1605]]） * [[明治]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1871]][[5月17日]]） - [[毛利敬親]]、[[長州藩]]主（* [[1819]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[延暦]]23rd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[804]][[5月11日]]） - [[最澄]]と[[空海]]が[[遣唐使]]として入唐 * [[延文]]1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]11th year（ユリウス暦[[1356]][[4月29日]]） - 北朝が[[文和]]より延文に[[改元]] * [[慶長]]16th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1611]][[5月10日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]]を[[二条城]]に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[4月20日]]） - [[神仏判然令]]公布。[[神仏混淆]]を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[明治]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[5月9日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * [[延宝]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1676]][[5月10日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（+ [[1726]]）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}}23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]][[5月11日]]） - [[最澄]]と[[空海]]が[[遣唐使]]として入唐 * [[延文]]1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]][[4月29日]]） - 北朝が[[文和]]より延文に[[改元]] * [[Keichō]]16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]][[5月10日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]]を[[二条城]]に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]][[4月20日]]） - [[神仏判然令]]公布。[[神仏混淆]]を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]][[5月9日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}}4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]][[5月10日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（+ [[1726]]）
== Deaths == * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]][[5月5日]]） - [[西山宗因]]、[[連歌師]]（* [[1605]]） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]][[5月17日]]） - [[毛利敬親]]、[[長州藩]]主（* [[1819]]）

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[遣唐使]] として入唐 * [[延文]] 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[文和]] より延文に[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[徳川家康]] が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]] を[[二条城]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[May 10]] ） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]] 、[[伏見宮]] 第14代当主（+ [[1726]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[May 5]] ） - [[西山宗因]] 、[[連歌師]] （* [[1605]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[May 17]] ） - [[毛利敬親]] 、[[長州藩]] 主（* [[1819]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|旧暦|1=" to "|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq="
revision.text:
[[sn:March 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] [[zh:三月廿八]] [[en:draft:March 28 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[遣唐使]] として入唐 * [[延文]] 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[文和]] より延文に[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[徳川家康]] が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]] を[[二条城]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[May 10]] ） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]] 、[[伏見宮]] 第14代当主（+ [[1726]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[May 5]] ） - [[西山宗因]] 、[[連歌師]] （* [[1605]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[May 17]] ） - [[毛利敬親]] 、[[長州藩]] 主（* [[1819]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[遣唐使]] として入唐 * [[延文]] 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[文和]] より延文に[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[徳川家康]] が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]] を[[二条城]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[May 10]] ） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]] 、[[伏見宮]] 第14代当主（+ [[1726]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[May 5]] ） - [[西山宗因]] 、[[連歌師]] （* [[1605]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[May 17]] ） - [[毛利敬親]] 、[[長州藩]] 主（* [[1819]] ）

[[sn:March 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] [[zh:三月廿八]] [[en:draft:March 28 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[遣唐使]] として入唐 * [[延文]] 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[文和]] より延文に[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[徳川家康]] が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]] を[[二条城]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[May 10]] ） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]] 、[[伏見宮]] 第14代当主（+ [[1726]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[May 5]] ） - [[西山宗因]] 、[[連歌師]] （* [[1605]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[May 17]] ） - [[毛利敬親]] 、[[長州藩]] 主（* [[1819]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:March 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] [[zh:三月廿八]] [[en:draft:March 28 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]] として入唐 * [[Enbun]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[文和]] よりEnbunに[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[徳川家康]] が上洛し、[[Toyotomi Hideyori]] を[[Nijō Castle]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[May 10]] ） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]] 、[[伏見宮]] 第14代当主（+ [[1726]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[May 5]] ） - [[西山宗因]] 、[[連歌師]] （* [[1605]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[May 17]] ） - [[毛利敬親]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（* [[1819]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]] として入唐 * [[Enbun]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[Bunna]] よりEnbunに[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[徳川家康]] が上洛し、[[Toyotomi Hideyori]] を[[Nijō Castle]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[May 10]] ） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]] 、[[伏見宮]] 第14代当主（+ [[1726]] ）

[[sn:March 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] [[zh:三月廿八]] [[en:draft:March 28 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]] として入唐 * [[Enbun]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[Bunna]] よりEnbunに[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] が上洛し、[[Toyotomi Hideyori]] を[[Nijō Castle]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[May 10]] ） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]] 、[[伏見宮]] 第14代当主（+ [[1726]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[May 5]] ） - [[西山宗因]] 、[[連歌師]] （* [[1605]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[May 17]] ） - [[毛利敬親]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（* [[1819]] ）

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]] として入唐 * [[Enbun]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[Bunna]] よりEnbunに[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] が上洛し、[[Toyotomi Hideyori]] を[[Nijō Castle]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[May 10]] ） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]] 、[[伏見宮]] 第14代当主（+ [[1726]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[May 5]] ） - [[西山宗因]] 、[[連歌師]] （* [[1605]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[May 17]] ） - [[毛利敬親]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（* [[1819]] ）
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] [[zh:三月廿八]] [[en:draft:March 28 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]] として入唐 * [[Enbun]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[Bunna]] よりEnbunに[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] が上洛し、[[Toyotomi Hideyori]] を[[Nijō Castle]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[May 10]] ） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]] 、[[伏見宮]] 第14代当主（+ [[1726]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[May 5]] ） - [[西山宗因]] 、[[連歌師]] （* [[1605]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[May 17]] ） - [[毛利敬親]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（* [[1819]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]] として入唐 * [[Enbun]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[Bunna]] よりEnbunに[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] が上洛し、[[Toyotomi Hideyori]] を[[Nijō Castle]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[May 10]] ） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]] 、[[伏見宮]] 第14代当主（+ [[1726]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[May 5]] ） - [[西山宗因]] 、[[連歌師]] （* [[1605]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[May 17]] ） - [[毛利敬親]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（* [[1819]] ）

revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]] として入唐 * [[Enbun]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[Bunna]] よりEnbunに[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] が上洛し、[[Toyotomi Hideyori]] を[[Nijō Castle]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[May 10]] ） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]] 、[[伏見宮]] 第14代当主（+ [[1726]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[May 5]] ） - [[西山宗因]] 、[[連歌師]] （* [[1605]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[May 17]] ） - [[毛利敬親]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（* [[1819]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 23rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[804]] [[May 11]] ） - [[最澄]] と[[空海]] が[[Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]] として入唐 * [[Enbun]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1356]] [[April 29]] ） - 北朝が[[Bunna]] よりEnbunに[[改元]] * [[Keichō]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1611]] [[May 10]] ） - [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] が上洛し、[[Toyotomi Hideyori]] を[[Nijō Castle]] に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 20]] ） - [[神仏判然令]] 公布。[[神仏混淆]] を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[May 9]] ） - [[明治天皇]] が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[804]] {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日}}) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as {{ill|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|ja|遣唐使}}. * [[Enbun]] 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1356]] {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Bunna|ja|文永}} to {{ill|Enbun|ja|延文}}. * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1611]] {{ill|May 10|ja|5月10日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ascended to Kyoto, calling upon {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}} at {{ill|Nijō Castle|ja|二条城}} for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1869]] {{ill|May 9|ja|5月9日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1676]] {{ill|May 10|ja|5月10日}}) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[1726]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1682]] {{ill|May 5|ja|5月5日}}) – {{ill|Nishiyama Sōin|ja|西山宗因}}, a renga master (born [[1605]]). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1871]] {{ill|May 17|ja|5月17日}}) – {{ill|Mōri Takachika|ja|毛利敬親}}, the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[1819]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]]

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[804]] {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日}}) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as {{ill|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|ja|遣唐使}}. * [[Enbun]] 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1356]] {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Bunna|ja|文永}} to {{ill|Enbun|ja|延文}}. * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1611]] {{ill|May 10|ja|5月10日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ascended to Kyoto, calling upon {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}} at {{ill|Nijō Castle|ja|二条城}} for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1869]] {{ill|May 9|ja|5月9日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1676]] {{ill|May 10|ja|5月10日}}) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[1726]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1682]] {{ill|May 5|ja|5月5日}}) – {{ill|Nishiyama Sōin|ja|西山宗因}}, a renga master (born [[1605]]). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1871]] {{ill|May 17|ja|5月17日}}) – {{ill|Mōri Takachika|ja|毛利敬親}}, the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[1819]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[804]] {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft}}) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as {{ill|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|ja|遣唐使|12=draft}}. * [[Enbun]] 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1356]] {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Bunna|ja|文永|12=draft}} to {{ill|Enbun|ja|延文|12=draft}}. * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|May 10|ja|5月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} ascended to Kyoto, calling upon {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼|12=draft}} at {{ill|Nijō Castle|ja|二条城|12=draft}} for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=draft}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1869]] {{ill|May 9|ja|5月9日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Meiji|ja|明治天皇|12=draft}} entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1676]] {{ill|May 10|ja|5月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=draft}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[1726]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1682]] {{ill|May 5|ja|5月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Nishiyama Sōin|ja|西山宗因|12=draft}}, a renga master (born [[1605]]). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1871]] {{ill|May 17|ja|5月17日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Mōri Takachika|ja|毛利敬親|12=draft}}, the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[1819]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿八]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[804]] {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft}}) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as {{ill|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|ja|遣唐使|12=draft}}. * [[Enbun]] 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1356]] {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Bunna|ja|文永|12=draft}} to {{ill|Enbun|ja|延文|12=draft}}. * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|May 10|ja|5月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} ascended to Kyoto, calling upon {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼|12=draft}} at {{ill|Nijō Castle|ja|二条城|12=draft}} for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=draft}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1869]] {{ill|May 9|ja|5月9日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Meiji|ja|明治天皇|12=draft}} entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1676]] {{ill|May 10|ja|5月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=draft}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[1726]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1682]] {{ill|May 5|ja|5月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Nishiyama Sōin|ja|西山宗因|12=draft}}, a renga master (born [[1605]]). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1871]] {{ill|May 17|ja|5月17日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Mōri Takachika|ja|毛利敬親|12=draft}}, the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[1819]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月28日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]23年（[[ユリウス暦]][[804年]][[5月11日]]） - [[最澄]]と[[空海]]が[[遣唐使]]として入唐 * [[延文]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1356年]][[4月29日]]） - 北朝が[[文和]]より延文に[[改元]] * [[慶長]]16年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1611年]][[5月10日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が上洛し、[[豊臣秀頼]]を[[二条城]]に呼び出して会見。徳川と豊臣の主従関係が逆転 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月20日]]） - [[神仏判然令]]公布。[[神仏混淆]]を禁止し神社と寺を分離独立 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[5月9日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が京都から江戸城に入城。[[東京奠都]]
== 誕生日 == * [[延宝]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1676年]][[5月10日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（+ [[1726年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[5月5日]]） - [[西山宗因]]、[[連歌師]]（* [[1605年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[5月17日]]） - [[毛利敬親]]、[[長州藩]]主（* [[1819年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839073]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 28|qq=March 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:804|804]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as [[:en:Japanese missions to Tang China|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]]. * [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1356|1356]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunna]] to [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ascended to Kyoto, calling upon [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]] at [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]] for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:May 9|May 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]] entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|qq=|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[:en:1726|1726]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:May 5|May 5]]) – [[:en:Nishiyama Sōin|Nishiyama Sōin]], a renga master (born [[:en:1605|1605]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:May 17|May 17]]) – [[:en:Mōri Takachika|Mōri Takachika]], the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1819|1819]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh min nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839073]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 28|qq=March 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:804|804]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as [[:en:Japanese missions to Tang China|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]]. * [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1356|1356]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunna]] to [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ascended to Kyoto, calling upon [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]] at [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]] for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:May 9|May 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]] entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|qq=|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[:en:1726|1726]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:May 5|May 5]]) – [[:en:Nishiyama Sōin|Nishiyama Sōin]], a renga master (born [[:en:1605|1605]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:May 17|May 17]]) – [[:en:Mōri Takachika|Mōri Takachika]], the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1819|1819]]).

== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|qq=|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[:en:1726|1726]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:May 5|May 5]]) – [[:en:Nishiyama Sōin|Nishiyama Sōin]], a renga master (born [[:en:1605|1605]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:May 17|May 17]]) – [[:en:Mōri Takachika|Mōri Takachika]], the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1819|1819]]).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839073]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 28|qq=March 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:804|804]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as [[:en:Japanese missions to Tang China|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]]. * [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1356|1356]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunna]] to [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ascended to Kyoto, calling upon [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]] at [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]] for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:May 9|May 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]] entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[:en:1726|1726]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:May 5|May 5]]) – [[:en:Nishiyama Sōin|Nishiyama Sōin]], a renga master (born [[:en:1605|1605]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:May 17|May 17]]) – [[:en:Mōri Takachika|Mōri Takachika]], the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1819|1819]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:804|804]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as [[:en:Japanese missions to Tang China|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]]. * [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1356|1356]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunna]] to [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ascended to Kyoto, calling upon [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]] at [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]] for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:May 9|May 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]] entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[:en:1726|1726]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:May 5|May 5]]) – [[:en:Nishiyama Sōin|Nishiyama Sōin]], a renga master (born [[:en:1605|1605]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:May 17|May 17]]) – [[:en:Mōri Takachika|Mōri Takachika]], the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1819|1819]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839073]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 28|qq=March 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:804|804]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as [[:en:Japanese missions to Tang China|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]]. * [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1356|1356]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunna]] to [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ascended to Kyoto, calling upon [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]] at [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]] for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:May 9|May 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]] entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[:en:1726|1726]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:May 5|May 5]]) – [[:en:Nishiyama Sōin|Nishiyama Sōin]], a renga master (born [[:en:1605|1605]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:May 17|May 17]]) – [[:en:Mōri Takachika|Mōri Takachika]], the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1819|1819]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:804|804]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as [[:en:Japanese missions to Tang China|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]]. * [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1356|1356]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunna]] to [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ascended to Kyoto, calling upon [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]] at [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]] for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:May 9|May 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]] entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[:en:1726|1726]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:May 5|May 5]]) – [[:en:Nishiyama Sōin|Nishiyama Sōin]], a renga master (born [[:en:1605|1605]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:May 17|May 17]]) – [[:en:Mōri Takachika|Mōri Takachika]], the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1819|1819]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.

== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[:en:1726|1726]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:May 5|May 5]]) – [[:en:Nishiyama Sōin|Nishiyama Sōin]], a renga master (born [[:en:1605|1605]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:May 17|May 17]]) – [[:en:Mōri Takachika|Mōri Takachika]], the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1819|1819]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:804|804]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as [[:en:Japanese missions to Tang China|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]]. * [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1356|1356]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunna]] to [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ascended to Kyoto, calling upon [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]] at [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]] for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:May 9|May 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]] entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[:en:1726|1726]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:May 5|May 5]]) – [[:en:Nishiyama Sōin|Nishiyama Sōin]], a renga master (born [[:en:1605|1605]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:May 17|May 17]]) – [[:en:Mōri Takachika|Mōri Takachika]], the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1819|1819]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839073]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 28|qq=March 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:804|804]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as [[:en:Japanese missions to Tang China|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]]. * [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1356|1356]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunna]] to [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ascended to Kyoto, calling upon [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]] at [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]] for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:May 9|May 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]] entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[:en:1726|1726]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:May 5|May 5]]) – [[:en:Nishiyama Sōin|Nishiyama Sōin]], a renga master (born [[:en:1605|1605]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:May 17|May 17]]) – [[:en:Mōri Takachika|Mōri Takachika]], the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1819|1819]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839073]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 28|qq=March 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:804|804]] [[:en:May 11|May 11]]) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as [[:en:Japanese missions to Tang China|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)]]. * [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1356|1356]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunna]] to [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ascended to Kyoto, calling upon [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]] at [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]] for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:May 9|May 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]] entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:May 10|May 10]]) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died [[:en:1726|1726]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:May 5|May 5]]) – [[:en:Nishiyama Sōin|Nishiyama Sōin]], a renga master (born [[:en:1605|1605]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:May 17|May 17]]) – [[:en:Mōri Takachika|Mōri Takachika]], the head of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1819|1819]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|804|en|804|WD=Q29998|lt=804}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|WD=Q2558|lt=May 11}}) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as {{ill|Japanese missions to Tang China|en|Japanese missions to Tang China|WD=Q262529|lt=Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)}}. * {{ill|Enbun|en|Enbun|WD=Q1145071|lt=Enbun}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1356|en|1356|WD=Q6130|lt=1356}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bunna}} to {{ill|Enbun|en|Enbun|WD=Q1145071|lt=Enbun}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1611|en|1611|WD=Q6768|lt=1611}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|WD=Q2557|lt=May 10}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} ascended to Kyoto, calling upon {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|en|Toyotomi Hideyori|WD=Q313641|lt=Toyotomi Hideyori}} at {{ill|Nijō Castle|en|Nijō Castle|WD=Q1013399|lt=Nijō Castle}} for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869}} {{ill|May 9|en|May 9|WD=Q2556|lt=May 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|WD=Q174231|lt=Emperor Meiji}} entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1676|en|1676|WD=Q7628|lt=1676}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|WD=Q2557|lt=May 10}}) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died {{ill|1726|en|1726|WD=Q6936|lt=1726}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenna|en|Tenna|WD=Q1145289|lt=Tenna}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1682|en|1682|WD=Q7648|lt=1682}} {{ill|May 5|en|May 5|WD=Q2550|lt=May 5}}) – {{ill|Nishiyama Sōin|en|Nishiyama Sōin|WD=Q1889691|lt=Nishiyama Sōin}}, a renga master (born {{ill|1605|en|1605|WD=Q6741|lt=1605}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|WD=Q2575|lt=May 17}}) – {{ill|Mōri Takachika|en|Mōri Takachika|WD=Q1088423|lt=Mōri Takachika}}, the head of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1819|en|1819|WD=Q6967|lt=1819}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328|qq=}}
