<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 28|qq=March 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|804|en|804|WD=Q29998|lt=804}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|WD=Q2558|lt=May 11}}) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as {{ill|Japanese missions to Tang China|en|Japanese missions to Tang China|WD=Q262529|lt=Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)}}. * {{ill|Enbun|en|Enbun|WD=Q1145071|lt=Enbun}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1356|en|1356|WD=Q6130|lt=1356}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bunna}} to {{ill|Enbun|en|Enbun|WD=Q1145071|lt=Enbun}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1611|en|1611|WD=Q6768|lt=1611}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|WD=Q2557|lt=May 10}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} ascended to Kyoto, calling upon {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|en|Toyotomi Hideyori|WD=Q313641|lt=Toyotomi Hideyori}} at {{ill|Nijō Castle|en|Nijō Castle|WD=Q1013399|lt=Nijō Castle}} for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869}} {{ill|May 9|en|May 9|WD=Q2556|lt=May 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|WD=Q174231|lt=Emperor Meiji}} entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1676|en|1676|WD=Q7628|lt=1676}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|WD=Q2557|lt=May 10}}) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died {{ill|1726|en|1726|WD=Q6936|lt=1726}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenna|en|Tenna|WD=Q1145289|lt=Tenna}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1682|en|1682|WD=Q7648|lt=1682}} {{ill|May 5|en|May 5|WD=Q2550|lt=May 5}}) – {{ill|Nishiyama Sōin|en|Nishiyama Sōin|WD=Q1889691|lt=Nishiyama Sōin}}, a renga master (born {{ill|1605|en|1605|WD=Q6741|lt=1605}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|WD=Q2575|lt=May 17}}) – {{ill|Mōri Takachika|en|Mōri Takachika|WD=Q1088423|lt=Mōri Takachika}}, the head of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1819|en|1819|WD=Q6967|lt=1819}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿八]][[zh:三月廿八]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 28|qq=March 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|804|en|804|WD=Q29998|lt=804|1=804}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|WD=Q2558|lt=May 11|1=May 11}}) – 【Saichō】 (最澄) and 【Kūkai】 (空海) entered Tang China as {{ill|Japanese missions to Tang China|en|Japanese missions to Tang China|WD=Q262529|lt=Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|1=Japanese missions to Tang China}}. * {{ill|Enbun|en|Enbun|WD=Q1145071|lt=Enbun|1=Enbun}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1356|en|1356|WD=Q6130|lt=1356|1=1356}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29|1=April 29}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bunna|1=Bun'ei}} to {{ill|Enbun|en|Enbun|WD=Q1145071|lt=Enbun|1=Enbun}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1611|en|1611|WD=Q6768|lt=1611|1=1611}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|WD=Q2557|lt=May 10|1=May 10}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} ascended to Kyoto, calling upon {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|en|Toyotomi Hideyori|WD=Q313641|lt=Toyotomi Hideyori|1=Toyotomi Hideyori}} at {{ill|Nijō Castle|en|Nijō Castle|WD=Q1013399|lt=Nijō Castle|1=Nijō Castle}} for a meeting, signifying a reversal in the relationship between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi clans. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20|1=April 20}}) – The {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja|神仏判然令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri†Shinbutsu_Bunri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=Shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1970535}} was promulgated, prohibiting the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|May 9|en|May 9|WD=Q2556|lt=May 9|1=May 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|WD=Q174231|lt=Emperor Meiji|1=Emperor Meiji}} entered Edo Castle from Kyoto, marking the foundation of Tokyo as the new capital.
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1676|en|1676|WD=Q7628|lt=1676|1=1676}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|WD=Q2557|lt=May 10|1=May 10}}) – {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|ja|伏見宮邦永親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga Shinnō|1=Fushimi-no-miya Kuninaga-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381095}}, the 14th head of the Fushimi-no-miya (died {{ill|1726|en|1726|WD=Q6936|lt=1726|1=1726}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenna|en|Tenna|WD=Q1145289|lt=Tenna|1=Tenna}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1682|en|1682|WD=Q7648|lt=1682|1=1682}} {{ill|May 5|en|May 5|WD=Q2550|lt=May 5|1=May 5}}) – {{ill|Nishiyama Sōin|en|Nishiyama Sōin|WD=Q1889691|lt=Nishiyama Sōin|1=Nishiyama Sōin}}, a renga master (born {{ill|1605|en|1605|WD=Q6741|lt=1605|1=1605}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|WD=Q2575|lt=May 17|1=May 17}}) – {{ill|Mōri Takachika|en|Mōri Takachika|WD=Q1088423|lt=Mōri Takachika|1=Mōri Takachika}}, the head of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1819|en|1819|WD=Q6967|lt=1819|1=1819}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|27|3|29|2|28|4|3|0328|qq=}}

{{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} ascended to Kyoto, calling upon {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|en|Toyotomi Hideyori|qid=Q313641|lt=Toyotomi and mandating the separation of shrines and temples. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian
